title: 16 Personalities Confessing Their Love
text: here's a special note from me I'm going to leave now so you can read it without me here and uh I hope to hear back from you soon unless you're totally put off by what I wrote in which case goodbye forever I have feelings for you do not make me elaborate on what specific feelings they may or may not be a mixture of chemicals floods my brain whenever I think about causing a phenomenon commonly known as love do you reciprocate this neurobiological response okay you know how I joke around all the time and I'm rarely sincere okay well I got to tell you something and it's going to sound like a joke but I'm not joking this time okay so you got to promise not to laugh all right you're laughing already and I haven't even said it yet okay stop laughing so I've made a fun scavenger hunt for you with Clues all over the city and at the end there's a special message for you from me you better get started uh this is probably going to take you about 6 hours man the burgers here are so good they're so warm and juicy and they smell so good I love these burgers and you know what else I feel all those same things about before I jump off this bridge using a used bungee cord I got off of eBay there's something I got to tell you you're all right in my book kid Alig go I want want to reveal to you something personal and confidential so I'm going to need you to sign this non-disclosure agreement which basically says you'll take what I'm about to say to the Grave I know I've told you I love you a million times before like literally the first time we ever met and I say it to basically everyone in my life all the time including my cat my dermatologist and the bista at Starbucks but when I say it to you now it's a little different if I had to choose between the spontaneous zany Adventures I love to go on around the world and you I'd pick you I mean it wouldn't be by a large margin but still you probably already know how I feel about you because I'm terrible at hiding my emotions they're just all over my face clear as day it's embarrassing we've been friends for a long time right but when we went out with the gang for ice cream and you got a triple scoop with hot fudge sprinkles brownie bits crushed butter fingers and apple pie

title: 16 Personalities Confessing Their Love
text: all over my face clear as day it's embarrassing we've been friends for a long time right but when we went out with the gang for ice cream and you got a triple scoop with hot fudge sprinkles brownie bits crushed butter fingers and apple pie chunks on top I started feeling something more so I just need you to know how much my heart bursts with love for you and I've been hiding my feelings for you these past 10 years and I can't hold it back anymore hello oh uh you didn't hear anything I just said did you you didn't say anything oh good I wasn't thinking anything either [Music] [Music] I've got a very special delivery of chocolates for you from a very special guy and it comes with a message saying I love you who could this special guy be is it Timmy what no I'm talking about me oh Timmy I just want to say I like like you oh well I'm flattered but I don't feel the same way you don't no are you sure I'm sure well I never would have said that except that I thought you liked me back I'm sorry but I still like you as a friend yeah yeah let's be friends you heard this before oh wow I've made a lot of 16 personalities comedy sketches on this channel you don't believe me well why don't you watch some more watch this one here you'll love it binge the whole playlist right here it'll take you several hours I appreciate your time commitment hit the like button if you didn't like this video I I tried my best see you next week until then stay cool and attractive
